title: adesmia divaricata
intro: Adesmia divaricata, also known as the "Divaricated pea" or "Sensitive pea", is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The plant has been reported to exhibit several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Adesmia divaricata are often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
